description: Create a maritime law enforcement training scenario titled 'TSS Rogue Intercept' in Bridge Command at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) TSS Rogue Intercept/. The scenario must simulate a merchant vessel violating the Dover Strait Traffic Separation Scheme (TSS) by traveling the wrong way (Northeast) in the Southwest-bound lane. Configure the environment for 'English Channel East' with visibility greater than 10nm. Set the ownship ('CG Patrol 42') at approximately Lat 51.02, Long 1.40, heading 225 degrees at 20 knots. Include at least two other vessels: a large cargo ship (the violator) positioned ahead of the ownship heading 045 degrees against traffic, and a compliant vessel heading 225 degrees with the flow. Create a briefing document at /home/ga/Documents/intercept_briefing.txt that cites COLREGS Rule 10 and describes the target vessel. Login: ga / password123
